requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica and Local Building Authority Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——哥斯达黎加消防队及地方建筑主管机关要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——哥斯大黎加消防隊及地方建築主管機關要求

summary.en: Fire safety for buildings and fixed installations in Costa Rica falls under the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica (Benemérito Cuerpo de Bomberos), which operates under Ley No. 8228 (Ley del Cuerpo de Bomberos). The Cuerpo de Bomberos issues permits, reviews designs, and carries out inspections for fire-protection systems in commercial and industrial facilities. Municipal building authorities also have jurisdiction over construction and installation permits. Costa Rica's fire-safety framework draws on NFPA codes as technical references — a pattern shared with other Central American countries with strong North American influence. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems, 2020/2023 editions) is the internationally dominant code for stationary BESS fire safety and is expected by project owners and EPCs as a technical design basis. Formal official adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for stationary BESS by the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date — this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the Cuerpo de Bomberos and the relevant municipal authority before project design is finalised. Accredited inspection bodies, including internationally recognised laboratories (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, SGS), are the expected route for fire-safety equipment certification where required.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加建筑及固定装置的消防安全由哥斯达黎加消防队（Benemérito Cuerpo de Bomberos）依据第8228号法律（消防队法）负责管辖。消防队为商业及工业设施的消防系统颁发许可证、审查设计并开展检查。市政建筑主管机关亦对建设和安装许可拥有管辖权。哥斯达黎加消防安全框架以NFPA规范作为技术参考——这与其他深受北美影响的中美洲国家的做法一致。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准，2020/2023版）是固定式BESS消防安全领域国际上占主导地位的规范，项目业主和EPC承包商将其作为技术设计依据。截至本数据集日期，哥斯达黎加消防队专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；这是一个高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前直接向消防队和相关市政机关核实。获认可检验机构——包括国际认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、SGS）——是消防安全设备认证在需要时的预期途径。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加建築及固定裝置的消防安全由哥斯大黎加消防隊（Benemérito Cuerpo de Bomberos）依據第8228號法律（消防隊法）負責管轄。消防隊為商業及工業設施的消防系統頒發許可證、審查設計並開展檢查。市政建築主管機關亦對建設和安裝許可擁有管轄權。哥斯大黎加消防安全框架以NFPA規範作為技術參考——這與其他深受北美影響的中美洲國家的做法一致。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準，2020/2023版）是固定式BESS消防安全領域國際上佔主導地位的規範，項目業主和EPC承包商將其作為技術設計依據。截至本數據集日期，哥斯大黎加消防隊專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；這是一個高優先級差距，須在項目設計最終確定前直接向消防隊和相關市政機關核實。獲認可檢驗機構——包括國際認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas、SGS）——是消防安全設備認證在需要時的預期途徑。

standards_or_laws: Ley No. 8228 — Ley del Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica (fire-safety authority enabling law)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (2020/2023 edition; internationally dominant BESS fire-installation code; Cuerpo de Bomberos formal adoption specifically for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with authority having jurisdiction)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (widely referenced fire suppression standard in Costa Rica)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (widely referenced fire alarm standard in Costa Rica)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
Municipal building codes — construction and installation permits required from the relevant municipalidad

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire-safety review by local fire authorities. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica or Costa Rican municipal authorities as equivalent to NFPA-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for project review by Costa Rican authorities.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准和地方消防主管机关的项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被哥斯达黎加消防队或市政机关认可为等同于基于NFPA的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在哥斯达黎加主管机关的项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準和地方消防主管機關的項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被哥斯大黎加消防隊或市政機關認可為等同於基於NFPA的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在哥斯大黎加主管機關的項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Fire-safety installation approval from the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica and the relevant municipal authority is a mandatory project gate for all commercial and industrial BESS installations in Costa Rica. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy NFPA-based requirements applied by Costa Rican authorities. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica whether NFPA 855 has been formally adopted as the applicable standard for stationary BESS installations and determine any Costa Rica-specific derogations or additional requirements; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, fire-suppression system design (NFPA 13 or equivalent), emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances per the relevant NFPA 855 occupancy table; (c) ensure fire-suppression equipment is certified by an accredited laboratory (UL, FM Global, Bureau Veritas, or SGS) where required by the authority having jurisdiction; (d) engage a qualified fire protection engineer for design review and permit application submission to the Cuerpo de Bomberos and the relevant municipalidad before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：哥斯达黎加消防队和相关市政机关的消防安全安装审批是哥斯达黎加所有商业及工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足哥斯达黎加主管机关采用的基于NFPA的要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向哥斯达黎加消防队确认NFPA 855是否已正式采纳为固定式BESS安装的适用标准，并确定任何哥斯达黎加专项豁免或额外要求；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、消防抑制系统设计（NFPA 13或等效）、紧急停机程序及根据相关NFPA 855场所分类表确定的隔离距离；（c）在管辖主管机关要求的情况下确保消防抑制设备经认可实验室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或SGS）认证；（d）在项目调试前聘请合格消防工程师进行设计审查并向消防队和相关市政机关提交许可申请。
gap.zht: 差距：哥斯大黎加消防隊和相關市政機關的消防安全安裝審批是哥斯大黎加所有商業及工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足哥斯大黎加主管機關採用的基於NFPA的要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向哥斯大黎加消防隊確認NFPA 855是否已正式採納為固定式BESS安裝的適用標準，並確定任何哥斯大黎加專項豁免或額外要求；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、消防抑制系統設計（NFPA 13或等效）、緊急停機程序及根據相關NFPA 855場所分類表確定的隔離距離；（c）在管轄主管機關要求的情況下確保消防抑制設備經認可實驗室（UL、FM Global、Bureau Veritas或SGS）認證；（d）在項目調試前聘請合格消防工程師進行設計審查並向消防隊和相關市政機關提交許可申請。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica fire-safety permit required for commercial and industrial BESS installations; NFPA 855 adoption specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with authority having jurisdiction
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica (Costa Rica national fire authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire-safety approval from the Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica and the relevant municipal authority is a mandatory installation gate for commercial and industrial BESS in Costa Rica. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA-based requirements applied by Costa Rican authorities. Engage the Cuerpo de Bomberos and a qualified fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code (including whether NFPA 855 is formally adopted for stationary BESS), any Costa Rica-specific requirements, and permit application procedures before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥斯达黎加消防队和相关市政机关的消防安全审批是哥斯达黎加商业及工业BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足哥斯达黎加主管机关采用的基于NFPA的要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与消防队及合格消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范（包括NFPA 855是否已正式采纳用于固定式BESS）、任何哥斯达黎加专项要求及许可申请程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥斯大黎加消防隊和相關市政機關的消防安全審批是哥斯大黎加商業及工業BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足哥斯大黎加主管機關採用的基於NFPA的要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與消防隊及合格消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範（包括NFPA 855是否已正式採納用於固定式BESS）、任何哥斯大黎加專項要求及許可申請程序。
